purpose: Shared cross-language fixture for policy, approval, and sandbox runtime-boundary semantics. Preview runtimes must execute these semantics before claiming runtime-core parity.

required_scenarios.name: policy_denies_unapproved_high_risk_tool
required_scenarios.description: A high-risk tool should be denied before execution unless policy and approval allow it.

required_scenarios.name: approval_pauses_and_resumes_step
required_scenarios.description: An approval-required tool creates an approval request, pauses the step, and resumes after approval without losing runtime state.

required_scenarios.name: sandbox_required_tool_fails_closed
required_scenarios.description: A sandbox-required tool must fail closed when no compatible sandbox executor is available.

preview_status: implemented by Go, TypeScript, and Rust preview runtimes as runtime-core parity gates; production adapter hardening remains separate
